example: A shrewd investor recognized the opportunity before anyone else.
exampleZh: 一位精明的投资者比其他人更早发现了机会。

example: Turn the metal crank slowly to raise the platform.
exampleZh: 慢慢转动金属曲柄以升起平台。

example: Her parents expressed strong disapproval of the risky decision.
exampleZh: 她的父母强烈反对这个冒险决定。

example: We should cherish the time spent with close friends.
exampleZh: 我们应该珍惜与亲密朋友相处的时光。

example: Try to visualize each step before beginning the difficult procedure.
exampleZh: 开始这项困难操作前，试着想象每个步骤。

example: News of further cuts caused agitation among hospital staff.
exampleZh: 进一步削减开支的消息引起了医院员工的焦虑。

example: Fresh mint gives the cold drink a pleasant flavor.
exampleZh: 新鲜薄荷为冷饮增添了宜人风味。

example: The donation will endow a permanent scholarship for rural students.
exampleZh: 这笔捐款将设立一项面向农村学生的永久奖学金。

example: Hasty action could precipitate a much wider political crisis.
exampleZh: 仓促行动可能引发更广泛的政治危机。

example: One unusual case cannot support such a broad generalization.
exampleZh: 一个特殊案例不足以支持如此宽泛的概括。

example: Her sharp intellect impressed professors throughout the interview.
exampleZh: 她敏锐的才智给面试中的教授们留下了深刻印象。

example: This versatile tool can cut, measure, and tighten screws.
exampleZh: 这种多用途工具可以切割、测量和拧紧螺丝。

example: The rapid spinning motion made several passengers feel dizzy.
exampleZh: 快速旋转让几名乘客感到头晕。

example: Each pilgrim carried food and water for the long journey.
exampleZh: 每位朝圣者都为长途旅程携带了食物和水。

example: The exhibition explores every facet of life in the ancient city.
exampleZh: 展览探索了古城生活的各个方面。

example: The injured animal began to thrash wildly in the net.
exampleZh: 受伤的动物开始在网中猛烈挣扎。

example: Years without rain left the farmland completely barren.
exampleZh: 多年的无雨天气使农田变得完全贫瘠。

example: The outcome may hinge on a single vote in parliament.
exampleZh: 结果可能取决于议会中的一票。

example: A fast shutter captured the bird while it was flying.
exampleZh: 高速快门捕捉到了飞行中的鸟。

example: Ships pass through the narrow strait throughout the year.
exampleZh: 船只全年都通过这条狭窄海峡。

example: Both universities benefit from a reciprocal student exchange program.
exampleZh: 两所大学都从互惠学生交换项目中受益。

example: The conspirators planned to assassinate the president during the parade.
exampleZh: 阴谋者计划在游行期间暗杀总统。

example: Dam construction caused the displacement of several riverside communities.
exampleZh: 大坝建设导致几个沿河社区搬迁。

example: Public transport has improved tremendously over the past decade.
exampleZh: 过去十年中，公共交通得到了极大改善。

example: New arrivals need time to assimilate local customs and language.
exampleZh: 新来者需要时间适应当地习俗和语言。

example: Use this pump to inflate the emergency life jacket.
exampleZh: 用这个气泵给应急救生衣充气。

example: Regular movement and balanced meals may promote healthy longevity.
exampleZh: 经常运动和均衡饮食可能有助于健康长寿。

example: The poet would muse beside the river for hours.
exampleZh: 诗人常常在河边沉思数小时。

example: Essential medical supplies are exempt from the import tax.
exampleZh: 基本医疗用品免征进口税。

example: An old willow bends over the edge of the pond.
exampleZh: 一棵老柳树弯向池塘边缘。

example: Researchers developed a method to quantify tiny changes in pressure.
exampleZh: 研究人员开发了一种量化微小压力变化的方法。

example: Donations covered most of the budget shortfall this year.
exampleZh: 捐款填补了今年预算缺口的大部分。

example: The family gathered around the hearth on winter evenings.
exampleZh: 冬夜里，一家人围坐在炉火旁。

example: A rash decision could damage years of careful negotiation.
exampleZh: 轻率的决定可能破坏多年的谨慎谈判。

example: A flat barge carried construction materials along the canal.
exampleZh: 一艘平底驳船沿运河运送建筑材料。

example: The document explains the rights and obligations arising thereof.
exampleZh: 该文件说明了由此产生的权利和义务。

example: Falling attendance is indicative of declining public interest.
exampleZh: 出席人数下降表明公众兴趣正在减弱。

example: All equipment must meet national standards of safety conformity.
exampleZh: 所有设备都必须符合国家安全标准。

example: The baker poured the ingredients into a large electric mixer.
exampleZh: 面包师把原料倒进大型电动搅拌机。

example: She added a raisin to the center of each biscuit.
exampleZh: 她在每块饼干中央放了一颗葡萄干。

example: Replace the empty ink cartridge before printing the report.
exampleZh: 打印报告前请更换空墨盒。

example: Careful experimentation led to a safer manufacturing process.
exampleZh: 谨慎实验促成了更安全的制造工艺。

example: The market remains in constant flux as technology develops.
exampleZh: 随着技术发展，市场一直处于不断变化之中。

example: Notwithstanding the heavy rain, the outdoor ceremony continued.
exampleZh: 尽管下着大雨，户外仪式仍继续举行。

example: Fragrant herbs grew beside the sunny kitchen window.
exampleZh: 芳香的香草生长在阳光充足的厨房窗边。

example: The university held a formal banquet for visiting scholars.
exampleZh: 大学为来访学者举行了正式宴会。

example: Early diagnosis greatly improves the treatment of tuberculosis.
exampleZh: 早期诊断能大大改善肺结核的治疗效果。

example: The office replaced old bulbs with efficient fluorescent lighting.
exampleZh: 办公室用高效荧光灯替换了旧灯泡。

example: He changed into warm pyjamas before reading in bed.
exampleZh: 他在床上阅读前换上了暖和的睡衣。

example: Engineers tested the compatibility of the device with older systems.
exampleZh: 工程师测试了该设备与旧系统的兼容性。

example: The human heart operates in a way analogous to a pump.
exampleZh: 人类心脏的运行方式类似于水泵。

example: A tolerant community respects differences in belief and lifestyle.
exampleZh: 宽容的社区尊重信仰和生活方式的差异。

example: The healthy baby had bright eyes and plump cheeks.
exampleZh: 这个健康婴儿有明亮的眼睛和丰满的脸颊。

example: The skilled weaver created complex patterns from colored thread.
exampleZh: 熟练的织工用彩线织出了复杂图案。

example: Stir the mixture until it becomes smooth and homogeneous.
exampleZh: 搅拌混合物，直到它变得光滑均匀。

example: The coach's speech helped energize the tired players.
exampleZh: 教练的讲话帮助疲惫的球员恢复了活力。

example: We heard a cuckoo calling from the distant woods.
exampleZh: 我们听见远处树林里有布谷鸟在叫。

example: The child inherited her father's thick curly hair.
exampleZh: 这个孩子遗传了父亲浓密的卷发。

example: Please duplicate the file before making any major changes.
exampleZh: 进行重大修改前请先复制这份文件。

example: All their effort came to nought after the permit expired.
exampleZh: 许可证到期后，他们的全部努力化为乌有。

example: The frightened crowd became hysterical when the lights failed.
exampleZh: 灯光熄灭时，受惊人群陷入歇斯底里的状态。

example: A stray dog waited quietly outside the bakery.
exampleZh: 一只流浪狗安静地等在面包店外。

example: The small lamp uses less than ten watts of power.
exampleZh: 这盏小灯的功率不足十瓦。

example: Sunlight filled the long nave of the ancient church.
exampleZh: 阳光照满了古老教堂狭长的中殿。

example: Heavy rain caused the river to overflow its banks.
exampleZh: 大雨导致河水漫过河岸。

example: The worker gave a tired grunt while lifting the box.
exampleZh: 工人抬箱子时疲惫地哼了一声。

example: The nurse prepared a slow infusion of pain medicine.
exampleZh: 护士准备了缓慢输注的止痛药。

example: An opaque curtain blocked all light from the street.
exampleZh: 不透明的窗帘挡住了街上的全部光线。

example: A faint gleam appeared on the horizon before sunrise.
exampleZh: 日出前，地平线上出现一线微光。

example: Citizens organized peaceful protests against years of tyranny.
exampleZh: 市民组织和平抗议，反对多年的暴政。

example: Police arrested the gangster outside a downtown hotel.
exampleZh: 警方在市中心一家酒店外逮捕了这名歹徒。

example: The Moslem community opened a cultural center near the university.
exampleZh: 穆斯林社区在大学附近开设了一座文化中心。

example: The young gorilla stayed close to its mother.
exampleZh: 这只小大猩猩紧紧跟在母亲身边。

example: Language classes support the assimilation of new immigrants.
exampleZh: 语言课程帮助新移民融入当地社会。

example: The coastal refinery processes imported crude oil into fuel.
exampleZh: 这座沿海炼油厂把进口原油加工成燃料。

example: Ordinarily, the library closes at six on weekdays.
exampleZh: 通常，图书馆工作日下午六点闭馆。

example: A neutron carries no net electrical charge.
exampleZh: 中子不带净电荷。

example: Each neuron communicates through electrical and chemical signals.
exampleZh: 每个神经元通过电信号和化学信号进行交流。

example: The government voted to outlaw trade in endangered wildlife.
exampleZh: 政府投票决定禁止濒危野生动物贸易。

example: Her confidence did not waver during the difficult interview.
exampleZh: 在艰难的面试中，她的信心没有动摇。

example: The university will bestow an honorary degree upon the scientist.
exampleZh: 大学将授予这位科学家荣誉学位。

example: Workers used a crane to hoist the steel beam.
exampleZh: 工人们用起重机吊起钢梁。

example: Fishing line can easily tangle around underwater branches.
exampleZh: 鱼线很容易缠在水下树枝上。

example: Continued exercise may aggravate the existing knee injury.
exampleZh: 继续锻炼可能会加重已有的膝伤。

example: A little honey adds natural sweetness to the tea.
exampleZh: 一点蜂蜜给茶增添了天然甜味。

example: The transport strike could paralyse activity across the capital.
exampleZh: 交通罢工可能使首都各项活动陷入瘫痪。

example: Many young trees perish during periods of extreme drought.
exampleZh: 许多幼树会在极端干旱时期死亡。

example: Her grandparents chose to emigrate in search of safer lives.
exampleZh: 她的祖父母选择移居国外，寻找更安全的生活。

example: The shield can deflect small pieces of flying metal.
exampleZh: 这块护盾能使飞来的小金属碎片偏转。

example: The injured player continued to limp toward the bench.
exampleZh: 受伤的球员继续一瘸一拐地走向替补席。

example: The soft feather began to tickle the child's nose.
exampleZh: 柔软的羽毛开始让孩子的鼻子发痒。

example: Experienced nurses impart practical knowledge to new staff.
exampleZh: 有经验的护士向新员工传授实用知识。

example: Climbers began to ascend the final slope before dawn.
exampleZh: 登山者在黎明前开始攀登最后一段山坡。

example: Parliament voted to repeal the outdated restriction on trade.
exampleZh: 议会投票废除了过时的贸易限制。

example: The engineer proposed an ingenious solution using recycled materials.
exampleZh: 工程师提出了一个使用回收材料的巧妙方案。

example: The lookout stood at the fore of the ship.
exampleZh: 瞭望员站在船的前部。

example: The room becomes excessively hot during summer afternoons.
exampleZh: 夏日下午，这个房间会变得过于炎热。

example: This lens can magnify tiny structures inside a cell.
exampleZh: 这个镜头可以放大细胞内部的微小结构。

example: Each colonist received a small plot of farmland.
exampleZh: 每位殖民者都得到了一小块农田。

example: The hospital investigated allegations of serious medical malpractice.
exampleZh: 医院调查了严重医疗失当的指控。
